pp2.5:1.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo ārabhati ca vippaṭisārī ca hoti, tañca cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāti, yatthassa te uppannā pāpakā akusalā dhammā aparisesā nirujjhanti, so evamassa vacanīyo—

pp2.5:1.2.pli: “āyasmato kho ārambhajā āsavā saṁvijjanti, vippaṭisārajā āsavā pavaḍḍhanti.

pp2.5:1.3.pli: Sādhu vatāyasmā ārambhaje āsave pahāya vippaṭisāraje āsave paṭivinodetvā cittaṁ paññañca bhāvetu.

pp2.5:1.4.pli: Evamāyasmā amunā pañcamena puggalena samasamo bhavissatī”ti.

pp2.5:2.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo ārabhati na vippaṭisārī hoti, tañca cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāti, yatthassa te uppannā pāpakā akusalā dhammā aparisesā nirujjhanti, so evamassa vacanīyo—

pp2.5:2.2.pli: “āyasmato kho ārambhajā āsavā saṁvijjanti, vippaṭisārajā āsavā nappavaḍḍhanti.

pp2.5:2.3.pli: Sādhu vatāyasmā ārambhaje āsave pahāya cittaṁ paññañca bhāvetu.

pp2.5:2.4.pli: Evamāyasmā amunā pañcamena puggalena samasamo bhavissatī”ti.

pp2.5:3.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo na ārabhati vippaṭisārī hoti, tañca cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāti, yatthassa te uppannā pāpakā akusalā dhammā aparisesā nirujjhanti, so evamassa vacanīyo—

pp2.5:3.2.pli: “āyasmato kho ārambhajā āsavā na saṁvijjanti, vippaṭisārajā āsavā pavaḍḍhanti.

pp2.5:3.3.pli: Sādhu vatāyasmā vippaṭisāraje āsave paṭivinodetvā cittaṁ paññañca bhāvetu.

pp2.5:3.4.pli: Evamāyasmā amunā pañcamena puggalena samasamo bhavissatī”ti.

pp2.5:4.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo na ārabhati na vippaṭisārī hoti, tañca cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāti, yatthassa te pāpakā akusalā dhammā aparisesā nirujjhanti, so evamassa vacanīyo—

pp2.5:4.2.pli: “āyasmato kho ārambhajā āsavā na saṁvijjanti, vippaṭisārajā āsavā nappavaḍḍhanti.

pp2.5:4.4.pli: Evamāyasmā amunā pañcamena puggalena samasamo bhavissatī”ti.

pp2.5:5.1.pli: Ime cattāro puggalā amunā pañcamena puggalena evaṁ ovadiyamānā evaṁ anusāsiyamānā anupubbena āsavānaṁ khayaṁ pāpuṇanti.

pp2.5:6.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo yassa puggalassa deti cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānapaccayabhesajjaparikkhāraṁ, tassa evaṁ hoti—

pp2.5:6.3.pli: “ahaṁ dammi, ayaṁ paṭiggaṇhātī”ti, tamenaṁ datvā avajānāti.

pp2.5:7.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo yena puggalena saddhiṁ saṁvasati dve vā tīṇi vā vassāni, tamenaṁ saṁvāsena avajānāti.

pp2.5:8.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo parassa vaṇṇe vā avaṇṇe vā bhāsiyamāne khippaññeva adhimuccitā hoti.

pp2.5:9.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo ittarasaddho hoti ittarabhattī ittarapemo ittarappasādo.

pp2.5:10.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo kusalākusale dhamme na jānāti, sāvajjānavajje dhamme na jānāti, hīnappaṇīte dhamme na jānāti, kaṇhasukkasappaṭibhāge dhamme na jānāti.

pp2.5:11.3.pli: idhekacco yodhājīvo rajaggaññeva disvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti saṅgāmaṁ otarituṁ.

pp2.5:11.5.pli: Ayaṁ paṭhamo yodhājīvo santo saṁvijjamāno lokasmiṁ.

pp2.5:12.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ, api ca kho dhajaggaññeva disvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti saṅgāmaṁ otarituṁ.

pp2.5:12.3.pli: Ayaṁ dutiyo yodhājīvo santo saṁvijjamāno lokasmiṁ.

pp2.5:13.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ, api ca kho ussāraṇaññeva sutvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti saṅgāmaṁ otarituṁ.

pp2.5:13.3.pli: Ayaṁ tatiyo yodhājīvo santo saṁvijjamāno lokasmiṁ.

pp2.5:14.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ sahati ussāraṇaṁ, api ca kho sampahāre haññati byāpajjati.

pp2.5:14.3.pli: Ayaṁ catuttho yodhājīvo santo saṁvijjamāno lokasmiṁ.

pp2.5:15.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ sahati ussāraṇaṁ sahati sampahāraṁ.

pp2.5:15.2.pli: So taṁ saṅgāmaṁ abhivijinitvā vijitasaṅgāmo tameva saṅgāmasīsaṁ ajjhāvasati.

pp2.5:15.4.pli: Ayaṁ pañcamo yodhājīvo santo saṁvijjamāno lokasmiṁ.

pp2.5:15.5.pli: Ime pañca yodhājīvā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmiṁ.

pp2.5:16.1.pli: Evamevaṁ pañcime yodhājīvūpamā puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā bhikkhūsu.

pp2.5:17.1.pli: Idhekacco bhikkhu rajaggaññeva disvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti brahmacariyaṁ sandhāretuṁ, sikkhādubbalyaṁ āvikatvā sikkhaṁ paccakkhāya hīnāyāvattati.

pp2.5:17.4.pli: “asukasmiṁ nāma gāme vā nigame vā itthī vā kumārī vā abhirūpā dassanīyā pāsādikā paramāya vaṇṇapokkharatāya samannāgatā”ti.

pp2.5:17.5.pli: So taṁ sutvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti brahmacariyaṁ sandhāretuṁ, sikkhādubbalyaṁ āvikatvā sikkhaṁ paccakkhāya hīnāyāvattati.

pp2.5:18.1.pli: Seyyathāpi so yodhājīvo rajaggaññeva disvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti saṅgāmaṁ otarituṁ, tathūpamo ayaṁ puggalo.

pp2.5:18.3.pli: Ayaṁ paṭhamo yodhājīvūpamo puggalo santo saṁvijjamāno bhikkhūsu.

pp2.5:19.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco bhikkhu sahati rajaggaṁ, api ca kho dhajaggaññeva disvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti brahmacariyaṁ sandhāretuṁ, sikkhādubbalyaṁ āvikatvā sikkhaṁ paccakkhāya hīnāyāvattati.

pp2.5:19.3.pli: Idha bhikkhu na heva kho suṇāti—

pp2.5:19.4.pli: “asukasmiṁ nāma gāme vā nigame vā itthī vā kumārī vā abhirūpā dassanīyā pāsādikā paramāya vaṇṇapokkharatāya samannāgatā”ti, api ca kho sāmaṁ passati itthiṁ vā kumāriṁ vā abhirūpaṁ dassanīyaṁ pāsādikaṁ paramāya vaṇṇapokkharatāya samannāgataṁ.

pp2.5:19.5.pli: So taṁ disvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti brahmacariyaṁ sandhāretuṁ, sikkhādubbalyaṁ āvikatvā sikkhaṁ paccakkhāya hīnāyāvattati.

pp2.5:20.1.pli: Seyyathāpi so yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ, api ca kho dhajaggaññeva disvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti saṅgāmaṁ otarituṁ, tathūpamo ayaṁ puggalo.

pp2.5:20.3.pli: Ayaṁ dutiyo yodhājīvūpamo puggalo santo saṁvijjamāno bhikkhūsu.

pp2.5:21.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco bhikkhu sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ, api ca kho ussāraṇaññeva sutvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti brahmacariyaṁ sandhāretuṁ, sikkhādubbalyaṁ āvikatvā sikkhaṁ paccakkhāya hīnāyāvattati.

pp2.5:21.3.pli: Idha bhikkhuṁ araññagataṁ vā rukkhamūlagataṁ vā suññāgāragataṁ vā mātugāmo upasaṅkamitvā ūhasati ullapati ujjagghati uppaṇḍeti.

pp2.5:21.4.pli: So mātugāmena ūhasiyamāno ullapiyamāno ujjagghiyamāno uppaṇḍiyamāno saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti brahmacariyaṁ sandhāretuṁ, sikkhādubbalyaṁ āvikatvā sikkhaṁ paccakkhāya hīnāyāvattati.

pp2.5:22.1.pli: Seyyathāpi so yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ, api ca kho ussāraṇaññeva sutvā saṁsīdati visīdati na santhambhati na sakkoti saṅgāmaṁ otarituṁ, tathūpamo ayaṁ puggalo.

pp2.5:22.3.pli: Ayaṁ tatiyo yodhājīvūpamo puggalo santo saṁvijjamāno bhikkhūsu.

pp2.5:23.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco bhikkhu sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ sahati ussāraṇaṁ, api ca kho sampahāre haññati byāpajjati.

pp2.5:23.3.pli: Idha bhikkhuṁ araññagataṁ vā rukkhamūlagataṁ vā suññāgāragataṁ vā mātugāmo upasaṅkamitvā abhinisīdati abhinipajjati ajjhottharati.

pp2.5:23.4.pli: So mātugāmena abhinisīdiyamāno abhinipajjiyamāno ajjhotthariyamāno sikkhaṁ appaccakkhāya dubbalyaṁ anāvikatvā methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevati.

pp2.5:24.1.pli: Seyyathāpi so yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ sahati ussāraṇaṁ, api ca kho sampahāre haññati byāpajjati, tathūpamo ayaṁ puggalo.

pp2.5:24.3.pli: Ayaṁ catuttho yodhājīvūpamo puggalo santo saṁvijjamāno bhikkhūsu.

pp2.5:25.1.pli: Puna caparaṁ idhekacco bhikkhu sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ sahati ussāraṇaṁ sahati sampahāraṁ.

pp2.5:25.2.pli: So taṁ saṅgāmaṁ abhivijinitvā vijitasaṅgāmo tameva saṅgāmasīsaṁ ajjhāvasati.

pp2.5:25.4.pli: Idha bhikkhuṁ araññagataṁ vā rukkhamūlagataṁ vā suññāgāragataṁ vā mātugāmo upasaṅkamitvā abhinisīdati abhinipajjati ajjhottharati.

pp2.5:25.5.pli: So mātugāmena abhinisīdiyamāno abhinipajjiyamāno ajjhotthariyamāno viniveṭhetvā vinimocetvā yena kāmaṁ pakkamati.

pp2.5:26.1.pli: So vivittaṁ senāsanaṁ bhajati araññaṁ rukkhamūlaṁ pabbataṁ kandaraṁ giriguhaṁ susānaṁ vanapatthaṁ abbhokāsaṁ palālapuñjaṁ.

pp2.5:26.2.pli: So araññagato vā rukkhamūlagato vā suññāgāragato vā nisīdati pallaṅkaṁ ābhujitvā ujuṁ kāyaṁ paṇidhāya parimukhaṁ satiṁ upaṭṭhapetvā.

pp2.5:26.3.pli: So abhijjhaṁ loke pahāya vigatābhijjhena cetasā viharati, abhijjhāya cittaṁ parisodheti;

pp2.5:26.4.pli: byāpādapadosaṁ pahāya abyāpannacitto viharati, sabbapāṇabhūtahitānukampī byāpādapadosā cittaṁ parisodheti;

pp2.5:26.5.pli: thinamiddhaṁ pahāya vigatathinamiddho viharati ālokasaññī sato sampajāno, thinamiddhā cittaṁ parisodheti;

pp2.5:26.6.pli: uddhaccakukkuccaṁ pahāya anuddhato viharati ajjhattaṁ vūpasantacitto, uddhaccakukkuccā cittaṁ parisodheti;

pp2.5:26.7.pli: vicikicchaṁ pahāya tiṇṇavicikiccho viharati akathaṅkathī kusalesu dhammesu, vicikicchāya cittaṁ parisodheti.

pp2.5:27.1.pli: So ime pañca nīvaraṇe pahāya cetaso upakkilese paññāya dubbalīkaraṇe vivicceva kāmehi vivicca akusalehi dhammehi savitakkaṁ savicāraṁ vivekajaṁ pītisukhaṁ paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharati;

pp2.5:28.1.pli: So evaṁ samāhite citte parisuddhe pariyodāte anaṅgaṇe vigatūpakkilese mudubhūte kammaniye ṭhite āneñjappatte āsavānaṁ khayañāṇāya cittaṁ abhininnāmeti.

pp2.5:28.2.pli: So “idaṁ dukkhan”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, “ayaṁ dukkhasamudayo”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, “ayaṁ dukkhanirodho”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, “ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti,

pp2.5:28.3.pli: “ime āsavā”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, “ayaṁ āsavasamudayo”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, “ayaṁ āsavanirodho”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, “ayaṁ āsavanirodhagāminī paṭipadā”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.

pp2.5:29.1.pli: Tassa evaṁ jānato evaṁ passato kāmāsavāpi cittaṁ vimuccati, bhavāsavāpi cittaṁ vimuccati, avijjāsavāpi cittaṁ vimuccati.

pp2.5:29.3.pli: “Khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā”ti pajānāti.

pp2.5:29.5.pli: Seyyathāpi so yodhājīvo sahati rajaggaṁ sahati dhajaggaṁ sahati ussāraṇaṁ sahati sampahāraṁ, so taṁ saṅgāmaṁ abhivijinitvā vijitasaṅgāmo tameva saṅgāmasīsaṁ ajjhāvasati, tathūpamo ayaṁ puggalo.

pp2.5:29.7.pli: Ayaṁ pañcamo yodhājīvūpamo puggalo santo saṁvijjamāno bhikkhūsu.

pp2.5:30.1.pli: Ime pañca yodhājīvūpamā puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā bhikkhūsu.

pp2.5:31.2.pli: Mandattā momūhattā piṇḍapātiko hoti, pāpiccho icchāpakato piṇḍapātiko hoti, ummādā cittavikkhepā piṇḍapātiko hoti, “vaṇṇitaṁ buddhehi buddhasāvakehī”ti piṇḍapātiko hoti, api ca appicchataṁyeva nissāya santuṭṭhiṁyeva nissāya sallekhaṁyeva nissāya idamatthitaṁyeva nissāya piṇḍapātiko hoti.

pp2.5:31.3.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ piṇḍapātiko appicchataṁyeva nissāya santuṭṭhiṁyeva nissāya sallekhaṁyeva nissāya idamatthitaṁyeva nissāya piṇḍapātiko, ayaṁ imesaṁ pañcannaṁ piṇḍapātikānaṁ aggo ca seṭṭho ca pāmokkho ca uttamo ca pavaro ca.

pp2.5:32.1.pli: Seyyathāpi nāma gavā khīraṁ, khīramhā dadhi, dadhimhā navanītaṁ, navanītamhā sappi, sappimhā sappimaṇḍo, sappimaṇḍaṁ tattha aggamakkhāyati;

pp2.5:32.2.pli: evamevaṁ yvāyaṁ piṇḍapātiko appicchataṁyeva nissāya santuṭṭhiṁyeva nissāya sallekhaṁyeva nissāya idamatthitaṁyeva nissāya piṇḍapātiko hoti, ayaṁ imesaṁ pañcannaṁ piṇḍapātikānaṁ aggo ca seṭṭho ca pāmokkho ca uttamo ca pavaro ca.

pp2.5:34.2.pli: Mandattā momūhattā sosāniko hoti, pāpiccho icchāpakato sosāniko hoti, ummādā cittavikkhepā sosāniko hoti, “vaṇṇitaṁ buddhehi buddhasāvakehī”ti sosāniko hoti, api ca appicchataṁyeva nissāya santuṭṭhiṁyeva nissāya sallekhaṁyeva nissāya idamatthitaṁyeva nissāya sosāniko hoti.

pp2.5:34.3.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ sosāniko appicchataṁyeva nissāya santuṭṭhiṁyeva nissāya sallekhaṁyeva nissāya idamatthitaṁyeva nissāya sosāniko, ayaṁ imesaṁ pañcannaṁ sosānikānaṁ aggo ca seṭṭho ca pāmokkho ca uttamo ca pavaro ca.

pp2.5:35.1.pli: Seyyathāpi nāma gavā khīraṁ, khīramhā dadhi, dadhimhā navanītaṁ, navanītamhā sappi, sappimhā sappimaṇḍo, sappimaṇḍaṁ tattha aggamakkhāyati;

pp2.5:35.2.pli: evamevaṁ yvāyaṁ sosāniko appicchataṁyeva nissāya santuṭṭhiṁyeva nissāya sallekhaṁyeva nissāya idamatthitaṁyeva nissāya sosāniko hoti, ayaṁ imesaṁ pañcannaṁ sosānikānaṁ aggo ca seṭṭho ca pāmokkho ca uttamo ca pavaro ca.

pp2.6:1.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni abhisambujjhati, tattha ca sabbaññutaṁ pāpuṇāti balesu ca vasībhāvaṁ, sammāsambuddho tena daṭṭhabbo.

pp2.6:2.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni abhisambujjhati, na ca tattha sabbaññutaṁ pāpuṇāti na ca balesu vasībhāvaṁ, paccekasambuddho tena daṭṭhabbo.

pp2.6:3.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni anabhisambujjhati, diṭṭheva dhamme dukkhassantakaro hoti, sāvakapāramiñca pāpuṇāti, sāriputtamoggallānā tena daṭṭhabbā.

pp2.6:4.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni anabhisambujjhati, diṭṭheva dhamme dukkhassantakaro hoti, na ca sāvakapāramiṁ pāpuṇāti, avasesā arahantā tena daṭṭhabbā.

pp2.6:5.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni anabhisambujjhati, na ca diṭṭheva dhamme dukkhassantakaro hoti, anāgāmī hoti anāgantā itthattaṁ, anāgāmī tena daṭṭhabbo.

pp2.6:6.1.pli: Tatra yvāyaṁ puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni anabhisambujjhati, na ca diṭṭheva dhamme dukkhassantakaro hoti, āgantā itthattaṁ, sotāpannasakadāgāmino tena daṭṭhabbā.

pp2.7:1.1.pli: Kathañca puggalo sakiṁ nimuggo nimuggova hoti?

pp2.7:1.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo samannāgato hoti ekantakāḷakehi akusalehi dhammehi.

pp2.7:1.3.pli: Evaṁ puggalo sakiṁ nimuggo nimuggova hoti.

pp2.7:2.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo ummujjati “sāhu saddhā kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu hirī kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu ottappaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu vīriyaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu paññā kusalesu dhammesū”ti.

pp2.7:2.3.pli: Tassa sā saddhā neva tiṭṭhati no vaḍḍhati hāyatiyeva, tassa sā hirī neva tiṭṭhati no vaḍḍhati hāyatiyeva, tassa taṁ ottappaṁ neva tiṭṭhati no vaḍḍhati hāyatiyeva, tassa taṁ vīriyaṁ neva tiṭṭhati no vaḍḍhati hāyatiyeva, tassa sā paññā neva tiṭṭhati no vaḍḍhati hāyatiyeva.

pp2.7:3.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo ummujjati “sāhu saddhā kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu hirī kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu ottappaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu vīriyaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu paññā kusalesu dhammesū”ti.

pp2.7:3.3.pli: Tassa sā saddhā neva hāyati no vaḍḍhati ṭhitā hoti, tassa sā hirī neva hāyati no vaḍḍhati ṭhitā hoti, tassa taṁ ottappaṁ neva hāyati no vaḍḍhati ṭhitaṁ hoti, tassa taṁ vīriyaṁ neva hāyati no vaḍḍhati ṭhitaṁ hoti, tassa sā paññā neva hāyati no vaḍḍhati ṭhitā hoti.

pp2.7:4.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo ummujjati “sāhu saddhā kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu hirī kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu ottappaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu vīriyaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu paññā kusalesu dhammesū”ti.

pp2.7:4.3.pli: So tiṇṇaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā sotāpanno hoti avinipātadhammo niyato sambodhiparāyano.

pp2.7:5.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo ummujjati “sāhu saddhā kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu hirī kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu ottappaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu vīriyaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu paññā kusalesu dhammesū”ti.

pp2.7:5.3.pli: So tiṇṇaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā rāgadosamohānaṁ tanuttā sakadāgāmī hoti sakideva imaṁ lokaṁ āgantvā dukkhassantakaro hoti.

pp2.7:6.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo ummujjati “sāhu saddhā kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu hirī kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu ottappaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu vīriyaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu paññā kusalesu dhammesū”ti.

pp2.7:6.3.pli: So pañcannaṁ orambhāgiyānaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā opapātiko hoti tattha parinibbāyī anāvattidhammo tasmā lokā.

pp2.7:7.1.pli: Kathañca puggalo ummujjitvā tiṇṇo hoti pāraṅgato thale tiṭṭhati brāhmaṇo?

pp2.7:7.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo ummujjati “sāhu saddhā kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu hirī kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu ottappaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu vīriyaṁ kusalesu dhammesu, sādhu paññā kusalesu dhammesū”ti.

pp2.7:7.3.pli: So āsavānaṁ khayā anāsavaṁ cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharati.

pp2.7:7.4.pli: Evaṁ puggalo ummujjitvā tiṇṇo hoti pāraṅgato thale tiṭṭhati brāhmaṇo.

pp2.7:8.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo aṭṭha vimokkhe kāyena phusitvā viharati paññāya cassa disvā āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

pp2.7:14.2.pli: Yassa puggalassa sotāpattiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipannassa saddhindriyaṁ adhimattaṁ hoti, saddhāvāhiṁ saddhāpubbaṅgamaṁ ariyamaggaṁ bhāveti.

pp2.7:14.4.pli: Sotāpattiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipanno puggalo saddhānusārī, phale ṭhito saddhāvimuttoti.

pp2.8:1.1.pli: Tattha katame cattāro maggasamaṅgino, cattāro phalasamaṅgino puggalā?

pp2.8:1.6.pli: ime cattāro maggasamaṅgino, ime cattāro phalasamaṅgino puggalā.

pp2.9:1.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni abhisambujjhati, tattha ca sabbaññutaṁ pāpuṇāti balesu ca vasībhāvaṁ.

pp2.9:2.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu sāmaṁ saccāni abhisambujjhati, na ca tattha sabbaññutaṁ pāpuṇāti na ca balesu vasībhāvaṁ.

pp2.9:3.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo aṭṭha vimokkhe kāyena phusitvā viharati paññāya cassa disvā āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

pp2.9:4.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo na heva kho aṭṭha vimokkhe kāyena phusitvā viharati paññāya cassa disvā āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

pp2.9:5.2.pli: Idhekacco puggalo aṭṭha vimokkhe kāyena phusitvā viharati paññāya cassa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

pp2.9:6.3.pli: “ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, tathāgatappaveditā cassa dhammā paññāya vodiṭṭhā honti vocaritā, paññāya cassa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

pp2.9:7.3.pli: “ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā”ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, tathāgatappaveditā cassa dhammā paññāya vodiṭṭhā honti vocaritā, paññāya cassa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti, no ca kho yathā diṭṭhippattassa.

pp2.9:8.2.pli: Yassa puggalassa sotāpattiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipannassa paññindriyaṁ adhimattaṁ hoti, paññāvāhiṁ paññāpubbaṅgamaṁ ariyamaggaṁ bhāveti.

pp2.9:8.4.pli: Sotāpattiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipanno puggalo dhammānusārī, phale ṭhito diṭṭhippatto.

pp2.9:9.2.pli: Yassa puggalassa sotāpattiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipannassa saddhindriyaṁ adhimattaṁ hoti, saddhāvāhiṁ saddhāpubbaṅgamaṁ ariyamaggaṁ bhāveti.

pp2.9:9.4.pli: Sotāpattiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipanno puggalo saddhānusārī, phale ṭhito saddhāvimuttoti.
